item.name: VehicleReviewRequest BVA Tests (7-case)
item.description: BVA + dirty case cho rating: Min-, Min, Min+, Nom, Max-, Max, Max+

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": 1,
  "modelId": 1,
  "rating": 1,
  "title": "Good car",
  "reviewText": "This is a great vehicle with good performance"
}

exec: pm.test("VR001 - Should return success for Min rating (1)", function () {

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": 1,
  "modelId": 1,
  "rating": 2,
  "title": "Fair car",
  "reviewText": "This car is acceptable but could be better"
}

exec: pm.test("VR002 - Should return success for Min+ rating (2)", function () {

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": 1,
  "modelId": 1,
  "rating": 3,
  "title": "Average car",
  "reviewText": "This car is average and meets basic expectations"
}

exec: pm.test("VR003 - Should return success for Nom rating (3)", function () {

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": 1,
  "modelId": 1,
  "rating": 4,
  "title": "Good car",
  "reviewText": "This is a very good vehicle overall"
}

exec: pm.test("VR004 - Should return success for Max- rating (4)", function () {

body.raw:
{
  "customerId": 1,
  "modelId": 1,
  "rating": 5,
  "title": "Excellent vehicle",
  "reviewText": "This is absolutely the best car I have ever driven"
}

body.raw:

    "customerId":  1,

    "rating":  0,
    "title":  "Good car",
